changes.value:
Test `integration::cli_integration::test_root_validate_undefined_variables` in swissarmyhammer-cli fails.

Location: /Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/swissarmyhammer-cli/tests/integration/cli_integration.rs:813

Assertion: `left == right` failed: validation with undefined variables should return exit code 2
  left: 1
  right: 2

The CLI returns exit code 1 when the test expects exit code 2 for undefined variable validation.
Fix test_root_validate_undefined_variables: exit code 1 instead of expected 2
